name: Excel Automation Solutions
inferred_need_1: PLC/SCADA connectivity and industrial protocol conversion
inferred_need_2: system integration and industrial device networking
source_description: We offer real-time hands-on practical training with major brands of PLC SCADA DCS that are widely used globally.
message:
Hope you are having a wonderful day.

Hello, this is Kali from BLIIOT. Our company focuses on industrial IoT connectivity products, especially gateways, edge controllers, and field data acquisition devices used in automation systems.

It looks like your projects involve PLC/SCADA connectivity and industrial protocol conversion / system integration and industrial device networking. Our BA building automation gateways together with industrial gateways and routers are often used in PLC, SCADA, and industrial communication projects.

If you have a current requirement, I can suggest matching models. If helpful, here is our website: https://bliiot.com/

Let me know if you would like a short catalog.

name: Neel Smartec Co
inferred_need_1: energy monitoring and utility equipment communication
inferred_need_2: IIoT edge integration and remote monitoring
source_description: Independent PLM and IIoT consulting for manufacturers — strategy, roadmap, and Industry 5.0 adoption. Vendor-agnostic. Award-winning author. India & internationally.
message:
Hope you are enjoying a good day.

Hi, Kali here from BLIIOT. We are an industrial IoT hardware supplier with products for gateways, routers, and remote acquisition in monitoring and utility scenarios.

It seems your projects are related to energy monitoring and utility equipment communication / IIoT edge integration and remote monitoring. For these applications, we usually recommend industrial gateways and routers together with ARM edge controllers for energy monitoring, remote utility access, and industrial data transmission.

If you are evaluating a remote monitoring project, I can recommend suitable products. For a quick overview, here is our website: https://bliiot.com/

If you are interested, I can send a short catalog.
